product: Custom autoformatting options for SQL queries
tagline: Customize autoformatting options for all of your SQL queries.
what_it_does: Customize autoformatting options for all of your SQL queries. Preview This feature is in Public Preview. This article explains how to customize SQL auto formatting options in the Databricks UI.
why_it_matters: Overview SQL formatting improves the readability and maintainability of your queries.
key_takeaway: Customize autoformatting options for all of your SQL queries.
